description: Use this API to change the identifier of the specified non-transformer branch or two-winding transformer. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = mbidbrn(ibus, jbus, id, idnew)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: One of the buses connected by the branch. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: Other bus connected by the branch. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Present circuit identifier of the branch for which the identifier is to be changed. (input; ‘1’ by default).

parameters.name: idnew
parameters.description: New identifier to be assigned to the branch. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: circuit ID from IBUS to JBUS not found.
circuit ID from IBUS to JBUS already exists.
invalid new identifier; cannot start with &, * or @
a non-blank new identifier must be specified.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
